ab: Mnsuupu ku bubu rudan mosa gnbaruy bbrigan ka ciga, madis egu sama pnhuma na ma sbege nami na snlmeyan ppuqun ta ita Seediq duri.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: Smkuxul meyah bbrigan na bubu rudan ka seediq, meyah maruy ucik ma ciyak rudu, egu seediq meyah kncheya mekan hnprayan na duri.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，辣椒和絲瓜很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the chilis and African eggplants, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: Malu riyung puqun hnprayan na sama bale ma ido dhequy ka heya, pnsrubu hmangac hei boyak ma mao, smkenux kncheya na ka seediq, kika meyah msseli mtbeku bbrigan hini.
ch: 她煮的山萵苣和糯米飯非常好吃，還有用山豬肉煮的馬告滷肉，味道吸引了很多客人，大家都來我們攤位排隊。
en: The Lactucin and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: Phpure ppuqun bubu rudan de, mosa ku smdamac seediq ka yaku. Lmawa ku "Pnhuma nami naq kana sama nii, ini pdai cmuwaq iyu, naaguh meyah maruy!"
ch: 奶奶煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我在一旁大喊著：「蔬菜都是自己種的，天然有機，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, \"The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!\"

ab: Wada asi brigi kana nadis miyan di, mesa bubu rudan "Ado isu ka mneyah dmayo."
ch: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \"It’s all thanks to your help.\"

ab: Ooda nii ge, snluhe ku knklaan qqhuni ma ppuqun na Seediq, slluhe bbale oda gnbaruy duri.
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: Qmita ku snkuxul riyung ppuqun ncbeyo ka bubu rudan, malu bale ma sqaras mu ka ndaan na nii duri.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常驕傲和榮幸。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
